reasoning: The resolution criteria require 'Zootopia 2' to have the absolute highest 3-day domestic opening weekend of 2025. Currently, the highest 3-day domestic opening of 2025 is 'A Minecraft Movie', which opened to an impressive $162.8 million (verified via Koimoi and Fortune sources). Because Zootopia 2 is a Thanksgiving movie opening on a Wednesday (November 26, 2025), its initial attendance will be spread across five days (Wed-Sun). Since the market uses specifically the 3-day portion (Fri-Sun) for its metric, Zootopia 2 is at a massive mathematical disadvantage. No animated film opening on Wednesday before Thanksgiving has ever approached $163 million for its Friday-Sunday portion (the largest 5-day Thanksgiving opens are historically around $90M-$100M total, so a $163M 3-day is practically impossible). With the bar securely at >$162.8M and competition from 'Wicked: Part Two' the week before, the probability of Zootopia 2 winning 'highest 3-day opening weekend of 2025' is virtually zero.
